summary: Matched and typed additional ifstatus code around the 803F9628 status element table, including an implementation of ifStatus_802F7134, conversion of a wrapper struct into a direct 8-element Element_803F9628 array, stronger callback/model pointer types, and more precise prototypes for if_802F73C4 and if_802F74D0. Review discussion identified that the archive section "ScInfCnt_scene_models" should be treated as DynamicModelDesc** rather than SceneDesc*, with a volatile local needed for matching despite unclear cause.
what_changed: Implemented ifStatus_802F7134 instead of leaving it as an unmatched stub marker.
Initialized static ifStatus_803F9628 as an array of 8 Element_803F9628 entries with HSD_GObj pointers, callback functions, numeric IDs, and flag-like values.
Changed ifStatus_803F9628 from a single Thing_803F9628 wrapper object to a direct Element_803F9628 ifStatus_803F9628[8] array.
Updated ifStatus_802F7220 cleanup to index ifStatus_803F9628[i] directly instead of ifStatus_803F9628.things[i].
Refined Element_803F9628.x8 from UNK_T to void (*)(HSD_GObj*) and Element_803F9628.x14 from s32 to DynamicModelDesc*.
Removed the Thing_803F9628 wrapper struct and its extra trailing u32 array from if/types.h.
Added sc/forward.h to expose DynamicModelDesc and baselib/forward.h in if_2F72.h to support HSD_GObj prototypes.
Changed if_802F73C4 and if_802F74D0 declarations from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to void if_802F73C4(HSD_GObj*) and void if_802F74D0(HSD_GObj*).
Added includes in ifstatus.c for m2c_macros.h, placeholder.h, sc/types.h, and lb/lbarchive.h, although the final diff excerpt no longer uses the M2C_FIELD approach shown in earlier review hunks.
Loaded the archive section "ScInfCnt_scene_models" using lbArchive_LoadSections and assigned the resulting DynamicModelDesc* entries into ifStatus_803F9628[i].x14 for eight elements.
smart_moves: Replaced repetitive manual initialization with two loops over the fixed 8-element status table, improving readability while preserving the matching behavior shown in the final diff.
Modeled the global at 803F9628 as the array that callers actually iterate over, avoiding the misleading Thing_803F9628.things wrapper and eliminating unused trailing fields.
Promoted unknown fields to specific callback and model descriptor pointer types once callsites and archive data clarified their roles.

Used DynamicModelDesc** volatile models in ifStatus_802F7134 after review feedback; this avoided the larger PAD_STACK/SceneDesc workaround and produced a cleaner typed load from lbArchive_LoadSections.
Kept the exact archive section name "ScInfCnt_scene_models" visible in code, which is useful evidence for connecting ifstatus model data to scene/archive resources.
decomp_lessons: Do not over-trust type usage in another function: the author initially inferred SceneDesc from gm_80181998, but review suggested DynamicModelDesc was the better local type for this ifstatus use.
When an archive section appears to contain an array of model descriptors, representing the loaded pointer as DynamicModelDesc** can remove awkward M2C_FIELD indexing and clarify intent.

A volatile local can be a legitimate matching tactic when the semantic type is believed correct but the compiler otherwise rearranges stack/register behavior; document uncertainty when the reason is not understood.
If a wrapper struct only exists to hold a fixed array and all known code indexes the array directly, retyping the global as an array can simplify both C and cleanup code.
Callback fields should be typed as function pointers as soon as prototypes are known; this makes static initializers and headers more self-documenting than UNK_T/UNK_PARAMS.
Large PAD_STACK values are a warning sign. Review explored replacing a 20-byte stack pad and SceneDesc pointer/M2C_FIELD approach with a smaller local buffer plus correct typed pointer.
naming_conventions: Preserved address-based names for partially understood symbols: ifStatus_802F7134, ifStatus_802F7220, ifStatus_803F9628, ifStatus_804D6D60, ifStatus_804D6D61.
Used subsystem prefix ifStatus_ for status interface functions and data.
Kept generic field names x0, x4, x8, xC, x10, x14, etc. in Element_803F9628 while improving their C types where evidence existed.
Renamed the global type usage away from Thing_803F9628 toward Element_803F9628[8], reflecting the concrete element array layout.
Header prototypes in if_2F72.h retain address comments such as /* 2F73C4 */ while replacing unknown signatures with typed HSD_GObj* parameters.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Used a fixed u8 _[8] local in ifStatus_802F7134 to influence stack layout.
Declared DynamicModelDesc** volatile models; reviewer noted the volatile was needed for matching but the exact reason was unclear.
Loaded data via lbArchive_LoadSections(*archive, (void**) &models, "ScInfCnt_scene_models", 0), matching the expected archive API cast pattern.
Looped over exactly 8 status entries for initialization and model descriptor assignment, matching the size of the static ifStatus_803F9628 table.
Earlier attempted tactics included PAD_STACK(20), SceneDesc* desc, and M2C_FIELD(&desc, s32**, 0)[i]; review steered this toward a typed DynamicModelDesc** solution.

review_feedback.author: lukechampine
review_feedback.feedback: Author flagged uncertainty on the initial ifStatus_802F7134 implementation: "not sure what's going on here 🤔".

review_feedback.author: lukechampine
review_feedback.feedback: Author noted that PAD_STACK(20) was a lot of extra stack and that declaring SceneDesc as a non-pointer did not align offsets.

review_feedback.author: r-burns
review_feedback.feedback: Reviewer suggested a cleaner implementation using u8 _[8], HSD_Archive**, DynamicModelDesc** volatile models, loops over 8 entries, and lbArchive_LoadSections; reviewer believed DynamicModelDesc was the correct type but was unsure why volatile was required.

review_feedback.author: lukechampine
review_feedback.feedback: Author accepted the DynamicModelDesc direction and explained the earlier SceneDesc assumption came from gm_80181998 loading "ScInfCnt_scene_models" into that type, while acknowledging gm_80181998 might be buggy.

follow_up_queries: Check whether gm_80181998 really should load "ScInfCnt_scene_models" as SceneDesc or whether that function has an incorrect type.
Search for other uses of ScInfCnt_scene_models to standardize the archive section's inferred type.
Investigate why DynamicModelDesc** volatile models is required for matching ifStatus_802F7134.
Confirm whether Element_803F9628.xC and x10 flag comments can be named based on usage of the initialized constants.
Look for remaining UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS declarations in if_2F72.h adjacent functions fn_802F7288, fn_802F75D4, fn_802F7670, and fn_802F770C.
